Module CST239Milestone
Package model

Class Armor

  • java.lang.Object
    • model.SalableProduct
      • model.Armor
  • public class Armor
extends SalableProduct
    Represents an Armor item in the store. This class exists so the inventory can contain specific game item types.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Armor​(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description, java.math.BigDecimal price, int quantity)
      Creates an Armor with the same core fields as a SalableProduct.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class model.SalableProduct

        decreaseStock, equals, getDescription, getName, getPrice, getQuantity, hashCode, increaseStock, setDescription, setPrice, setQuantity, toString

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Armor

        public Armor​(java.lang.String name,
             java.lang.String description,
             java.math.BigDecimal price,
             int quantity)
        Creates an Armor with the same core fields as a SalableProduct.
        Parameters:
        name - armor name
        description - armor description
        price - armor price
        quantity - armor quantity in stock
